subcodes.first_line: O Ali! O target of destiny! O Ali! O thou who art pierced by the arrows of hatred! Hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی ان یا هدف القضا ان یا علی ان یا ایها المتشبک من سهام البغضا اسمع
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @predictions and prophecies, @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
